description_long: This is a classic round alarm clock with a red metal body and two silver bells on top, mounted on a rectangular wooden base. The clock face is cream-colored with black hour and minute hands, and black Arabic numerals marking each hour. The back of the clock features two winding keys and a small adjustment knob, all in metallic silver. The bells are connected by a curved metal handle, and the clock sits upright on the wooden platform. The overall design is reminiscent of vintage mechanical alarm clocks, with a sturdy and slightly glossy finish. The wooden base adds a touch of warmth and stability, making it suitable for display on a desk or shelf.
description: A vintage-style red metal alarm clock with silver bells and a cream face, mounted on a rectangular wooden base. The clock features black Arabic numerals and metallic adjustment components.
description_view_0: The clock is seen from a side angle, showing the red body, cream face, and part of the wooden base.
description_view_1: The back of the clock is visible, displaying two metallic winding keys, a knob, and the curved handle atop the bells.
description_view_2: Another side angle similar to view 0, with the clock face partially visible and the red body prominent.
description_view_3: The front view shows the full cream clock face with black Arabic numerals, black hands, and both silver bells on top.
attribute_face_design: Round cream face with black Arabic numerals, black hands, and a subtle decorative pattern in the center.
